title: FOOD BOX - 211info
text: JOSEPH CLINIC FOOD BOX Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a food box of non-perishable foods. Items depend on current supplies and availability. 401 N Main Street Joseph, OR 97846 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm, Saturday 9am-1pm. Closed Thanksgiving, Christmas, and New Year's Day. All other holidays 9am-1pm. Email (541) 426-4502 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 426-4502 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Wallowa County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Food Pantries Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HARVEST SHARE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - WINDING WATERS CLINIC PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
